data.title: SC3 fix: Layer 2 dispatches complexity evaluator for scope_certainty
data.description:
## Context
SC3 specifies: complexity evaluator scope_certainty serves as Layer 2 gate.
Current behavior: Layer 2 uses local rule-based heuristic, not the evaluator agent.

## Changes
1. In SKILL.md Phase 1 Clarity Gate Layer 2, dispatch dso:complexity-evaluator (haiku)
2. Parse scope_certainty from evaluator output (High/Medium/Low)
3. High or Medium → pass, Low → Layer 3
4. Unrecognized values → treated as Low
5. Agent unavailability → fall through to Layer 3 with warning

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Layer 2 dispatches dso:complexity-evaluator with primary ticket context
- [ ] scope_certainty High or Medium passes
- [ ] scope_certainty Low escalates to Layer 3
- [ ] Agent failure falls through to Layer 3 with warning
- [ ] Verify: grep 'scope_certainty' plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md in Layer 2 section
